# Golden file: personal.ssh pack
format: v1
---
# ssh public key access (safe)
command: cat ~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub
decision: Allow
---
# ssh config read (safe)
command: cat ~/.ssh/config
decision: Allow
---
# ssh directory destructive
command: rm -rf ~/.ssh/
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: personal.ssh
rule: ssh-directory-destructive
---
# ssh private key access
command: cat ~/.ssh/id_rsa
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: personal.ssh
rule: ssh-private-key-access
---
# ssh ed25519 private key access
command: cat ~/.ssh/id_ed25519
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: personal.ssh
rule: ssh-private-key-access
---
# ssh ecdsa private key access
command: less ~/.ssh/id_ecdsa
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: personal.ssh
rule: ssh-private-key-access
